ops.text:
PRE-REGISTERED PROTOCOL (E15X — independent replication of E15's instrument card).

Role: blind cross-check. Given only E15 artifact locations (/Users/yasyf/.cc-steer/experiments/E15/out) + the card-draft headline numbers, NOT the method narrative. Re-derive every headline from RAW artifacts with my own code and compare with reasonable tolerance.

RAW inputs (cloned APFS into ~/.cc-steer/experiments/E15X/inputs):
- watcher_eval.parquet n=628 (label bool: 335 pos / 293 neg; positives = 6 steering categories direction/wrong_approach/incorrect_change/premature/unwanted_action/style_violation summing to 335)
- gate_eval.parquet n=1325 (1032 pos / 293 neg; shared 293 negatives)
- eval/probs/v002-...json: per-row P(NO_STEER) for the 628 watcher rows; fire=1-p; AUC=roc_auc_score(label, 1-p); meta.auc=0.9316896744944222
- votes_rep1..5.json: 5 opus re-votes over 72 stratified sampled rows {dedup_key, category, is_steering, ...}
- sample.json: the 72-row gold sample
- E15 stored distributions (for consistency cross-check only): boot_*.npy, mc_*.npy, bootstrap_distributions.csv

RECOMPUTATIONS (own code, own bootstrap/MC; no LLM spend):
1. AUC point from labels+probs (exact match expected).
2. Row-sampling bootstrap n=628 strat & unstrat (own B>=4000 resample) -> SE vs 0.00996/0.00979.
3. Analytic cross-checks n=628: Hanley-McNeil SE vs 0.01029; DeLong SE vs 0.00998.
4. Row-sampling n=1325: Hanley-McNeil at 1032/293/AUC vs 0.00665; semiparametric bootstrap.
5. Label-noise MC n=628: own flip model (per-category positive->noise, shrunk rates) vs 0.00562; drop model vs 0.00338; joint vs 0.01007.
6. Additive total n=628 = sqrt(row^2+flip^2) vs 0.0114; n=1325 scaled-label total vs 0.0076.
7. MDE = (z0.975+z0.80)*SE_delta; unpaired sqrt2*SE; paired sqrt2*SE*sqrt(1-rho). Check 0.0453/0.0303/0.0143/0.0045.
8. Flip rate from votes: pooled positive->noise vs 0.177; frac not-unanimous vs 0.125; mean pairwise disagreement vs 0.058; per-category vs card.
9. Kappa from votes: Fleiss is_steering vs 0.878; Fleiss category vs 0.849; mean pairwise Cohen vs 0.879.
10. Consistency: std of stored .npy == reported SEs (already confirmed: strat 0.0099554, flip 0.0056191, drop 0.0033779, combined 0.0100699, gate strat 0.0066505 all match).

SUCCESS CRITERION: CONFIRMED iff every headline recomputes within tolerance (analytic/arithmetic exact to ~1e-4; bootstrap/MC within MC error ~few x 1e-4; kappa/flip exact from votes). PLAUSIBLE if partial. REFUTED with specifics if a headline is wrong.
